name: section/cta
description: Call-to-action band — quiet hairline-bordered section with title, description, and centered actions. Replace demo content before shipping.

meta.name: Cta
meta.description: Call-to-action band — quiet hairline-bordered section with title, description, and centered actions. Replace demo content before shipping.

props.name: title
props.description: Primary heading of the CTA band

props.name: actions
props.description: Buttons or links centered below the description

props.name: headingLevel
props.description: HTML heading level for document outline control

examples.title: CTA band
examples.code: <Cta title="Ready to ship?" description="Add Cascade to your project in minutes." actions={<><Button>Get started</Button><Button variant="ghost">View on GitHub</Button></>} />
examples.description: Quiet bordered band with centered heading, description, and action buttons

whenToUse: A call-to-action band with title, description, and centered actions
Prompting conversion between or after marketing sections
whenNotToUse: The primary page intro — use Hero

related.name: Hero
related.reason: Hero opens the page; CTA reinforces conversion later

related.name: Section
related.reason: Use the plain section for non-CTA content

intent.a11yRationale: Renders a section with a heading and clearly labeled action controls.
